hero.headline: Phoenix Emergency Plumbing — *Same Day*, No Overtime Fees
hero.subheadline: Licensed plumbers respond in 30 minutes or less. Transparent pricing, quality repairs, and we never charge overtime rates for evenings or weekends.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Phoenix Plumbing Services
services_section.subheading: From burst pipes to slow drains, we handle it all with same-day service

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repair
services.description: 24/7 emergency response for burst pipes, water heater failures, and major leaks. Our licensed plumbers arrive within 30 minutes with fully stocked trucks.

services.title: Advanced Leak Detection
services.description: State-of-the-art equipment locates hidden leaks in walls, slabs, and underground lines without destructive digging. Save thousands in water damage.

services.title: Professional Drain Cleaning
services.description: High-pressure hydro jetting and camera inspections clear stubborn clogs in kitchen sinks, toilets, and main sewer lines. Same-day service available.

services.title: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.description: Expert repair of copper, PVC, and PEX pipes. Trenchless sewer line replacement saves your landscaping. Licensed work with permits handled.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of tankless and traditional water heaters. Energy-efficient upgrades available with manufacturer warranties.

about.heading: Trusted Phoenix Plumbers Since 2015
about.body: Desert Plumbing Phoenix has served the Valley for nearly a decade. Our licensed, insured team specializes in fast emergency response and honest pricing. We never charge overtime fees because plumbing problems don't wait for business hours. Every job comes with our satisfaction guarantee.

reviews.name: Maria R.
reviews.text: Water heater died on Sunday morning and these guys were at my house in 25 minutes! No weekend upcharge either. Mike was professional and had it fixed same day. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Slab leak was costing us $400/month in water bills. Desert Plumbing found it fast with their camera equipment and repaired it without tearing up our floors. Saved us thousands.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Main line backed up into our garage at 11pm. Called and they answered immediately, had someone here within the hour. Fair pricing and cleaned up everything perfectly.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Phoenix
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the Valley of the Sun

cta.heading: Need Plumbing Help Right Now?
cta.body: Don't wait for a small problem to become expensive water damage. Our licensed plumbers respond in 30 minutes with transparent pricing and no overtime fees.
